_description: Per-segment fork constraints for Bab 00. Used by scene generator and validator.

segments.label: Genesis Error
segments.canon_anchor: GUA arrives at office. System boots. ON TRACK. Nothing feels important.
danger_zones: Do not change GUA's internal state significantly — this is the baseline.
Do not introduce cosmic elements yet.

segments.label: First Contact
segments.canon_anchor: LO duduk dua meja dari gua. GUA notices LO's typing pattern without intent.
danger_zones: Do not make GUA already know LO personally.
Do not invent prior interactions.

segments.label: Daily Standup
segments.canon_anchor: Zoom call. Safe sentences. Progress/Blocker/Alignment. MANAGER mm-hmm.
danger_zones: Do not change the standup structure — it establishes office ritual.
must_preserve: GUA and LO both give vague updates

segments.label: Bug Janggal
segments.canon_anchor: Timestamp bug writes 2-3 seconds before event. LO approaches: 'Lo ngerasa gak?'
danger_zones: Do not claim GUA and LO have known each other for years.
Do not remove the timestamp anomaly unless fork record explicitly breaks it.
Do not turn the moment into explicit confrontation without price.
may_change: Whether first sync happens immediately or is delayed

segments.label: First Sync
segments.canon_anchor: Bug fixed in 10 minutes. No debate. Atomic append. Queue not mutex.
danger_zones: Do not make them argue about the solution.
Do not make the fix take significantly longer without price.
may_change: How they arrive at the solution

segments.label: Residu
segments.canon_anchor: Both change without noticing. GUA's typing fragments. LO's review: 'Clean. Ship it.'
danger_zones: Do not make them immediately aware of the sync.
Do not remove the residue — it is the evidence of the sync.
may_change: How long the residue takes to appear

segments.label: Pantry
segments.canon_anchor: Microwave broken. 'Kerja itu kayak ngisi sesuatu yang bocor terus.' Same language.
danger_zones: Do not remove the recognition of shared language.
Do not make this a romantic setup.

segments.label: Folder Error
segments.canon_anchor: GUA creates _sandbox. LO independently sends pattern_matching_utils.py. Neither knew.
danger_zones: Do not remove the independent convergence.
Do not make them coordinate explicitly at this point.

segments.label: Genesis Error on Stealth Folder
segments.canon_anchor: Git hook anomaly. LO types genesis.txt. GUA joins split-screen. 'Biarin.' The Void is born.
danger_zones: Do not make VoidOS forced — consent architecture must stand.
Do not remove the collaborative real-time editing.
Do not report the error.

segments.label: Naming The Error
segments.canon_anchor: Stealth Project named. 'Karena tidak semua error perlu di-fix.' System log Day Zero.
danger_zones: Do not remove the naming act — naming carries consequence.
Do not 'fix' the error retrospectively.
must_preserve: Thesis: not all errors need fixing
may_change: How explicitly they acknowledge what they're building
